calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, CSR: Carlito Mandia, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
John P. Hurabiel, Esq., for Plaintiff Haymand Brohers, Inc. also present Jeffrey Lance, Authorized Agent.
Defendant, Christine Gist present in pro per.
Parties had a reached a settlement by stipulation.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Stipulation for judgment filed and read on the record.
Premises located at 926 Potrero St. SF
Defendant to tender to plaintiff 2 checks, one in the amount of $1,500.00 to cover rent from today until September 9,2003, second one in the amount of $2,000.00 that will be returned to defendant if she vacates the premises by September 9, 2003. See other terms on the stipulation.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2003 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christine L. Gist, propria persona, defendant and moving party.
John P. Hurabiell, Esq., Huppert & Hurabiell, Esq. 415-387-3001, for plaintiff and opposing party Hayman Brothers, Inc.
*Appearances and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT CHRISTINE L. GIST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- demurrer overruled with 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Candice Yount, CSR #2737 (DEW/301/CW)
